name: From Zurich: Day trip to Lucerne incl. boat tour
description: Discover From Zurich: Day trip to Lucerne incl. boat tour in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover From Zurich: Day trip to Lucerne incl. boat tour in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Day trips
subcategory.description: Find and book a day trip by bus through beautiful Swiss landscapes. Get on and let's go. You don't have to worry about any tedious organization on a day trip and can instead enjoy the ride to the fullest while being chauffeured to your excursion destination. Switzerland's well-developed road network allows excursions to all popular places and natural beauties

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online

gallery.alternativeText: Boat trips on Lake Lucerne, Lucerne, in summer. Promenade with historic buildings.

Lucerne Lion Monument with Water Feature and Greenery
Lucerne Day Trip: View of the Old Town, relaxed atmosphere by the water, and historic buildings.
Lucerne Old Town with historic buildings and market stalls.
Jesuit Church Lucerne on a sunny day with green water
Chapel Bridge Lucerne with Water Tower in the Sunshine, surrounded by Water and Plants
Chapel Bridge Lucerne with wooden structure and image elements on the roof.
Lucerne day trip with cafés by the river, people enjoying the weather
